subcodes.first_line: O my compassionate Lord! These souls are servants of Thy threshold and faithful guardians who, night and day, are enkindled with the fire of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان اين نفوس بندگان آستانند و پاسبانهای راستان شب و روز به نار محبتت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
